description_long: This is a vintage-style motorcycle with a weathered, beige exterior and brown leather seats. The frame is constructed from metal, featuring a classic rounded fuel tank, exposed engine components, and prominent front and rear fenders. The motorcycle has two large spoked wheels with thick tires, and the front suspension is supported by visible coil springs. The handlebars are wide and slightly curved, equipped with rear-view mirrors and basic controls. The rear section includes a luggage rack, a single taillight, and a license plate holder, while the exhaust system runs along the right side of the bike.
description: A vintage beige motorcycle with brown leather seats, spoked wheels, and a classic metal frame. Features include wide handlebars, exposed engine, and a rear luggage rack.
description_view_0: Front view showing the round headlight, wide handlebars, and front wheel with visible suspension.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the fuel tank, engine, brown seats, and spoked wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the taillight, license plate holder, and rear wheel with luggage rack.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the exhaust pipe, engine, and both seats with the rear wheel.
